assessment.note: He names a clear pattern: under pressure he prioritizes polish over the core message, which is a strong clarity gap in how he judges good work.

new_queue.label: Core message miss
new_queue.name: When you lose the core message, what are you missing in the brief?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific clarity failure he named before moving on.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is making growth feel stuck for you right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the main constraint on his development from his perspective.

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete near-term behavior change with ownership.
